dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Edward double-checks the map as he walks, analyzing the route and storefronts. He’s tired, but determination keeps him steady.

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: Everything matches the coordinates. Good. If this pans out, Mom won’t have to stretch herself so thin.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Even while cautious, his motivation stays the same: he wants to support his family—no matter what.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [He opens the café door. Musical chimes ring out—unnaturally harmonious.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: A cautious aura enters! Sharp eyes, logical posture—intriguing!

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: I’m here about your job posting. I wanted to verify everything first.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Caution usually hides fear, but yours stems from responsibility. Admirable!

dialogueLines.speaker: Edward (Barista)
dialogueLines.text: I’m the eldest in my family. I have to make sure I take the right steps—for my siblings, and for my mom.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Kit nods slowly, expression bright with interest and respect.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: A grounded soul with a strong sense of duty—excellent material for the Wish House!

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Come, Edward! Let’s begin your introduction to our delightful chaos.
